//: Mirrors the Claude SessionStart git-status hook in .claude/settings.json. Codex has no $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR, so resolve the repo root via git.

hooks.command: repo=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || pwd); cd "$repo" && echo "[harness] branch: $(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null || echo 'n/a') | uncommitted: $(git status --porcelain 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d ' ') file(s)"
